item.description:
ContentCam Nightly 20260723210225 is a native macOS camera studio for creating a clean, content-ready camera feed for OBS, meetings, streams, and vertical video. All camera processing stays on your Mac.
## Commits since previous Nightly `nightly-20260723194737`
- [`ce44e2c`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/ce44e2cc1c1c2affd6eb37d77d1057fe850a1a31) Check for updates every 30 minutes - [`8b57778`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/8b57778cad10ea29b55a7a4438ef7cee2a0d7af5) Add ContentCam app icon - [`6bcaf85`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/6bcaf85c8be04a446d18b8154f49071d61c4a6d5) Show documentation in app - [`c56df46`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/c56df467f17c668e25123d08479dfa2cbd04b97c) Open in-app changelog from update history - [`df941aa`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/df941aaaf8d63c66d31ff7a093a4231802c4910f) Restore previous studio session - [`0add0a9`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/0add0a9e21fd7764473c423b660dfd6bd9126852) Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam - [`e2f6dce`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/e2f6dce2d269eb305ce452b13d2b8364593b5e3e) Bump build number to 20260723202538 [skip ci] - [`79c6f64`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/79c6f6454cf7d1c917f7aa89ca4882fea6bf378f) Fix swift compile error - [`606631c`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/606631c36561c35dd7f183eba04b6fa0f91e171d) Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam - [`2692406`](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/commit/269240651253f1fc46375f8557ad5583c4bd8295) Bump build number to 20260723210225 [skip ci]
[View the full changelog](https://github.com/jayb029/contentcam/releases/tag/nightly-20260723210225)
